caption.full:
Sophie Nélisse to star in Netflix's 'This Summer Will Be Different'.

Sophie Nélisse has been cast as Lucy in the upcoming Netflix adaptation of Carley Fortune's bestselling novel. The series is set on Prince Edward Island and will film there and in Toronto this summer. Fortune's novel became a New York Times bestseller after its 2024 release.

What are you most excited to see in Sophie Nélisse’s take on Lucy?

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.

#MovieNews #ThisSummerWillBeDifferent #SophieNelisse #PEI
caption.firstComment: I’m here for Sophie Nélisse as Lucy — the book’s oyster scene already had me imagining this casting, so I’m all in. How about you — which part of the story do you hope they keep just as written?

youtube.title: Sophie Nélisse Stars in 'This Summer Will Be Different'
youtube.description:
Sophie Nélisse stars as Lucy in Netflix's upcoming TV adaptation of Carley Fortune's bestselling novel, 'This Summer Will Be Different.' The series is set across multiple summers on Prince Edward Island. Production is scheduled to take place in Prince Edward Island and Toronto later this summer.

AI-assisted recap by The Screen Report.
